rationale: Diff contains only a result.json execution evidence file; no changes to execute_bead_loop.go, no triage.Decide() integration, no tests. None of the 4 acceptance criteria are demonstrated by the diff.

findings.summary: No changes to cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go — AC#1 (loop calls triage.Decide() after VerdictBlock/VerdictRequestChanges) not evidenced
No implementation of BLOCK ladder (re-attempt → escalate → needs_human) — AC#2 not evidenced
No wiring of review-pairing-degraded events into decision context — AC#3 not evidenced
No new or updated tests for BLOCK ladder progression or degraded-pairing bias — AC#4 not evidenced
